response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills, particularly in full-stack and tooling, but lacks direct experience with the core C++ and industrial automation focus of the role. Their background in diverse languages and frameworks shows adaptability, though their recent work skews toward TypeScript/Node.js rather than C++ or embedded systems. Security and SDL expertise is not evident in the resume.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in software development across multiple domains (web, mobile, desktop, embedded).
Proven leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and mentorship (workshops, talks, TDD advocacy).
Strong problem-solving and cross-functional collaboration skills, with a focus on testable, high-quality code.
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience; most roles emphasize TypeScript, Node.js, or Dlang instead of the required C++/STL expertise.
No explicit mention of industrial automation, IoT protocols (e.g., MQTT, OPC UA), or secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices.
Cloud experience (AWS) is present but not aligned with the preferred Microsoft Azure for this role.
